step_rationale: LOX-1 is the key endothelial scavenger receptor for oxLDL; drives atherogenesis.
mechanism: LOX-1 mediates uptake of oxidized LDL by endothelial cells and macrophages, fueling plaque lipid accumulation and inflammation.
